TA and Tutor Information

Use this page to learn more about your Teaching Assistants and Tutors. You can customize the sections and content as needed.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

TA — NAME 1

Department: [Department Name]

Bio:
Enter a short description about yourself.

UTRGV Email: your.email@utrgv.edu
Discord: username#0000
WhatsApp: [optional]
Other: [optional]

Major: [Your Major]
Other Education: [Certifications, degrees]

How I ended up being a TA for {OrgUnitName}:
Short description here.

Hobbies / Fun Fact:
Something fun about you.

Tutor — NAME 1

Department: [Department Name]

Bio:
Enter a short description about yourself.

UTRGV Email: your.email@utrgv.edu
Discord: username#0000
WhatsApp: [optional]
Other: [optional]

Major: [Your Major]
Other Education: [Certifications, degrees]

Why did I choose to tutor?
Short description here.

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:



<section aria-label="TA and Tutor Information"
  style="max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#313131;line-height:1.5;">

  
  <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:16px;padding:18px;margin-bottom:16px;background:#ffffff;">

    <h2 style="margin:0 0 12px 0;color:#cb4900;">TA — NAME 1</h2>

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:120px 1fr;gap:16px;align-items:start;">

      
      <div>
        <img src="PASTE-IMAGE-LINK"
             alt="Photo of TA NAME 1"
             style="width:100%;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #ddd;">
      </div>

      
      <div>

        <p><strong>Department:</strong> [Department Name]</p>

        <p><strong>Bio:</strong><br>
        Enter a short description about yourself.</p>

        <p><strong>UTRGV Email:</strong> your.email@utrgv.edu<br>
        <strong>Discord:</strong> username#0000<br>
        <strong>WhatsApp:</strong> [optional]<br>
        <strong>Other:</strong> [optional]</p>

        <p><strong>Major:</strong> [Your Major]<br>
        <strong>Other Education:</strong> [Certifications, degrees]</p>

        <p><strong>How I ended up being a TA for {OrgUnitName}:</strong><br>
        Short description here.</p>

        <p><strong>Hobbies / Fun Fact:</strong><br>
        Something fun about you.</p>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


  
  <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:16px;padding:18px;background:#ffffff;">

    <h2 style="margin:0 0 12px 0;color:#cb4900;">Tutor — NAME 1</h2>

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:120px 1fr;gap:16px;align-items:start;">

      
      <div>
        <img src="PASTE-IMAGE-LINK"
             alt="Photo of Tutor NAME 1"
             style="width:100%;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #ddd;">
      </div>

      
      <div>

        <p><strong>Department:</strong> [Department Name]</p>

        <p><strong>Bio:</strong><br>
        Enter a short description about yourself.</p>

        <p><strong>UTRGV Email:</strong> your.email@utrgv.edu<br>
        <strong>Discord:</strong> username#0000<br>
        <strong>WhatsApp:</strong> [optional]<br>
        <strong>Other:</strong> [optional]</p>

        <p><strong>Major:</strong> [Your Major]<br>
        <strong>Other Education:</strong> [Certifications, degrees]</p>

        <p><strong>Why did I choose to tutor?</strong><br>
        Short description here.</p>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>

← Back to catalog
